title: Groom dies in air crash moments after departing wedding, while ‘devastated’ bride miraculously survives
description: "When she touched him, she called out to him. He was already cold."
content:
A Georgia groom fretted about the fog before being tragically killed in a helicopter crash moments after leaving his own wedding while his bride miraculously survived with only cuts and bruises.
Dav… [+2433 chars]
de: Der Bräutigam stirbt kurz nach der Hochzeit bei einem Flugzeugabsturz, während die „am Boden zerstörte“ Braut wie durch ein Wunder überlebt. „Als sie ihn berührte, rief sie nach ihm. Ihm war schon kalt.“
en: Groom dies in air crash moments after departing wedding, while ‘devastated’ bride miraculously survives. "When she touched him, she called out to him. He was already cold."
la: Sponsus in caeli fragore momentis post nuptias discedentibus moritur, dum 'sponsus vastata est mirabiliter superstes'. "Cum tetigisset eum, clamavit ad eum. Jam frigidus erat."

title: Fog Is Teeming With Life—But What It Eats Is the Weird Part
description: The ratio of water to microbial life in fog rivals that of oceans and lakes, new research has found. Sounds gross, but it's actually good news.
content: Horror director John Carpenter got it half right: Something alive is hiding in the fog. But its not vengeful supernatural beings; its not even malicious, really. In fact, we should probably be gratef… [+4007 chars]
de: Im Nebel wimmelt es vor Leben – aber was er frisst, ist das Seltsame. Das Verhältnis von Wasser zu mikrobiellem Leben im Nebel konkurriert mit dem von Ozeanen und Seen, wie neue Forschungsergebnisse ergeben haben. Klingt eklig, ist aber eigentlich eine gute Nachricht.
en: Fog Is Teeming With Life—But What It Eats Is the Weird Part. The ratio of water to microbial life in fog rivals that of oceans and lakes, new research has found. Sounds gross, but it's actually good news.
la: Caligo fetat cum vita—Sed quid edit fatuum est. Ratio aquae ad vitam microbialem in nebula aemulorum oceanorum et lacus, novas investigationes invenit. Crassum sonat, sed vere bonum nuntium est.
